claim: Builds a generalized sonification/barrier scanner for Talagrand radial traces, encoding barrier altitude, majorization excess, radial pull, and Lambda_hc silence.
claim_boundary: Diagnostic artifact only; not a proof.

channels.F: barrier altitude; ratio=exp(F); encoded by pitch
channels.Lambda_hc: silent Act-kernel channel; should remain zero in public sonification
channels.dF: radial pull; encoded indirectly in brightness
channels.kmax: top-k cumulative excess location; recorded in CSV

sonification_schema.interpretation: Dissonance below the barrier is harmless; dissonance at the barrier is the proof obstruction.
sonification_schema.name: Generalized barrier sonification schema
sonification_schema.purpose: Convert radial Talagrand barrier dynamics into a temporal invariant signal.

trace_summaries.description: random w=12 radial trace; no sampled barrier dissonance
known w=16 harmless-dissonance trace: majorization fails far below barrier
random w=16 radial trace; safe test channel
